name: check_availability
description: Checks the specified barber's calendar for availability at a specific date and time.

barber_name.description: The name of the barber they want to book with. E.g., 'Ahmet' or 'Any'.

date.description: The date they want to book in YYYY-MM-DD format.

time.description: The time they want to book in HH:MM AM/PM format (e.g., '3:00 PM').

name: confirm_booking
description: Confirms the booking and locks in the appointment in the calendar. Must only be called after user explicitly agrees to the time.

customer_name.description: The first and last name of the customer.

customer_phone.description: The phone number of the customer in E.164 format, suitable for WhatsApp.

start_time.description: The confirmed date and time in ISO-8601 format.
